articles.title: The Internet Reacts To Phranque, The New God Of War’s Talking Cube Voiced By Jack Quaid
articles.summary: The new God of War game, titled God of War: Laufey, features a talking cube named Phranque as one of its characters. The cube is voiced by Jack Quaid and has been a fan favorite since his introduction in the trailer for the game. Phranque's ability to bounce around the battlefield and try to crush things with his gelatinous body makes him a compelling companion for Faye, Kratos' wife, as she navigates the afterlife of the gods. The cube's presence has sparked both praise and criticism from fans, with some appreciating its unique abilities and others finding it too simplistic or even disturbing.

Nakamura, known for her quirky-cool demeanor and infectious onstage presence, was last seen promoting Kemuri at the 2023 Game Awards. Players will track yokai down, possess them, and take on their powers to help them hunt bigger prey.
